Analysis of Waiting Times and Opposite‑Direction Buses Across Peak Periods

Introduction

Our dataset contains 22 bus waiting time observations collected between March 23 and April 02.
The analysis focuses on two key metrics: Daily Patterns and Waiting Time by Observation Period.

Average waiting time by weekday

plot1

  • Best service (lowest average waiting time) happens on Sat with 3 minutes average wait

  • Worst service (highest average waiting time) occurs on Wed with 6.25 minutes average wait

Total waiting time by time of day

plot2

  • Lowest total waiting time: Morning period
    (42 minutes)

  • Highest total waiting time: Afternoon period
    (54 minutes)

Waiting time distribution by weekday

plot3

Combined Bus Daily Pattern Analysis

Key insights from Combined Bus Daily Pattern analyzed categories:

  • Day with highest average waiting time: Wed
    (6.2 minutes)

  • Period with highest average waiting time: Afternoon
    (4.9 minutes)

  • Period with lowest average waiting time: Morning
    (3.8 minutes)
